# centerTextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text provider for the center text.

## Declaration

```swift
@_NilHidden<CLKTextProvider> @objc final var centerTextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

The template supports multicolored text from this text provider.

## Accesing the Content

- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge provider for the template.
- **bottomLabel**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.
